start.speaker: Narrator
start.text: Festival morning in Sharuan. Before the throne-room audience, Sherward drifts into memory and walks his city in disguise.

codex_unlocks.title: Incognito Walk
codex_unlocks.details: Sherward starts the morning hidden in plain sight among city crowds.

adalin_market.speaker: Adalin
adalin_market.text: You still pick up fallen apples before you pick up titles, my prince.

codex_unlocks.title: Adalin
codex_unlocks.details: Sherward's closest emotional anchor in the opening memories.

map_gallery.speaker: Narrator
map_gallery.text: In his chamber he studies the map: Lorena, Argelia, Doren, Zarandia, and the crimson threat of Krimora.

codex_unlocks.title: World Map Chamber
codex_unlocks.details: Sherward reviews allied and hostile regions before meeting Sebastian in the throne hall.

codex_unlocks.title: Krimora Marked as Primary Threat
codex_unlocks.details: The morning map review frames Krimora as the core strategic risk to Sharuan.

juice_spill.speaker: Narrator
juice_spill.text: His hands shake, grape juice spills over formal trousers, and he changes outfits before rushing through the laundry wing.

codex_unlocks.title: Laundry Detour
codex_unlocks.details: A small mistake exposes Sherward's anxiety before the confrontation.

darius_arrival.speaker: Darius
darius_arrival.text: Steady breath, Sherward. A crown tests fear before it tests strength.

codex_unlocks.title: Darius
codex_unlocks.details: An elder elf of great age who still appears no older than thirty.

darius_cosmos.speaker: Darius
darius_cosmos.text: Before kings and bloodlines, there was only order, and the fracture that made Noctus.

paradise_banishment.speaker: The Almighty
paradise_banishment.text: Noctus, you are cast from light. Leave this heaven and carry your own darkness.

codex_unlocks.title: Noctus
codex_unlocks.details: A dark presence known as a face in the void, born from exile.

noctus_echo.speaker: Noctus
noctus_echo.text: Then I return as dread, and dread will kneel to me.

father_call.speaker: Sebastian
father_call.text: You are late. I heard about your plans after coronation... and this Adalin.

sherward_reply.speaker: Sherward
sherward_reply.text: I will rule with duty and love together. I will not be forced to choose one truth over the other.

training_framework.speaker: Narrator
training_framework.text: Training becomes formal doctrine: two trainers (Adrian and Darius), and boss trials against stone armors and Sebastian.

codex_unlocks.title: Training Protocol: Four Trials
codex_unlocks.details: Core instruction uses Adrian and Darius as trainers, with stone-armored and Sebastian boss trials.

codex_unlocks.title: Training Roster Confirmed
codex_unlocks.details: Opening training codifies trainers, boss checks, and progression in the Codex.

training_miniboss.speaker: Sebastian
training_miniboss.text: Sebastian enters the yard as a live boss check: one exchange, no excuses, no ceremony.

codex_unlocks.title: Sebastian's Training Visit
codex_unlocks.details: Sebastian confronts Sherward as a final test of discipline and resolve.

codex_unlocks.title: Sebastian Boss Trial
codex_unlocks.details: Training progression includes direct pressure tests against Sebastian in person.

throne_hall_decline.speaker: Narrator
throne_hall_decline.text: By the throne, the same man looks older. His shoulders are iron, but his breath is not.

sebastian_throne.speaker: Sebastian
sebastian_throne.text: Power is expensive, son. I paid with blood and years.

flight_escape.speaker: Narrator
flight_escape.text: The argument breaks. Sherward launches from the walls, forcing wings and will to answer fear.

crash_landing.speaker: Narrator
crash_landing.text: The sky turns red. He falls hard into the Krimorian woods.

codex_unlocks.title: Krimora Forest
codex_unlocks.details: A burgundy nightmare under a red sky where silence feels predatory.

krimora_speaks.speaker: Krimora
krimora_speaks.text: Welcome, oathborn prince. Bleed, and this forest will learn your name.

codex_unlocks.title: Krimora (The Red Death)
codex_unlocks.details: A fiery, crimson presence whose fury burns through land and minds.

adrian_cage.speaker: Narrator
adrian_cage.text: Near the thorned bushes: a cage, rusted bars, and Adrian still alive.

adrian_line.speaker: Adrian
adrian_line.text: Break it and move. Krimora hunts hesitation first.

codex_unlocks.title: Adrian
codex_unlocks.details: Freed from a Krimorian cage and forced to move before the forest closes in.

codex_unlocks.title: Adrian Rescued
codex_unlocks.details: Sherward cuts Adrian free on the edge of Krimora's hunting ground.

dwarven_gate.speaker: Narrator
dwarven_gate.text: Together they reach the dwarven entrance: stone gates carved with old craft marks.

dwarven_halls.speaker: Narrator
dwarven_halls.text: Beyond lie vault sectors of treasure, forge chambers, and a beast-yard of gem-born hybrids.

codex_unlocks.title: Dwarven Caves
codex_unlocks.details: Treasury vaults, crafting chambers, gemstone hybrids, and deep sovereign architecture.

dwarven_throne.speaker: Narrator
dwarven_throne.text: At the center rises a cavern throne hall so vast that Sharuan's throne room seems modest beside it.

goblin_march.speaker: Narrator
goblin_march.text: Soon after the dwarven caves, Sherward and Adrian march with Torvin and a dwarf detachment into their first major goblin melee.

codex_unlocks.title: Torvin
codex_unlocks.details: Dwarven field leader who commands the detachment supporting Sherward after the cave alliance.

codex_unlocks.title: Dwarven Expedition Warband
codex_unlocks.details: Stone-trained strike unit fighting alongside Adrian and Sherward in early field actions.

goblin_melee.speaker: Narrator
goblin_melee.text: This clash becomes the first large tutorial battle: tight formations, mixed weapons, and real attrition under pressure.

codex_unlocks.title: First Major Brawl
codex_unlocks.details: Sherward, Adrian, and Torvin lead a full engagement against goblin forces after the caves.

cleansing_awaken.speaker: Sherward
cleansing_awaken.text: I can cast only a weak cleanse for now, but it strips corruption long enough to keep the line alive.

codex_unlocks.title: Weak Cleansing Unlocked
codex_unlocks.details: Early battlefield utility skill that removes light corruption and stabilizes allies briefly.

codex_unlocks.title: First Cleansing Cast
codex_unlocks.details: The skill first manifests during the post-cave goblin engagement.

memory_fade.speaker: Narrator
memory_fade.text: Memory fades after the first campaigns of training. The real road starts now.
